introSection: Tren Minero (English: Mine Train) was a steel kiddie indoor roller coaster previously located at Coney Park in Trujillo, Trujillo, Peru.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a chain of minecarts.

fullText:
Tren Minero (English: Mine Train) was a steel kiddie indoor roller coaster previously located at Coney Park in Trujillo, Trujillo, Peru.



The train is designed to resemble a chain of minecarts.
